mnemonics: GREEN CODE: Gauge, Reduce, Eliminate, Evaluate, Normalize - Continuous Optimization Delivers Efficiency
keyPoints: Measure energy consumption before and after optimizations
Focus on algorithmic efficiency to reduce computational load
Utilize hardware power management features effectively
commonMistakes: Optimizing code without first measuring energy impact
Ignoring idle state power consumption of components
Focusing only on CPU efficiency while neglecting other power-drawing components
